ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trains" (
  "train_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each train */,
  "train_number" TEXT /* Number of the train */,
  "train_name" TEXT /* Name of the train */,
  "train_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of train (e.g., Mail/Express Rake, COV-Reserved Rake) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Total capacity of the train */,
  "fare_per_km" REAL /* Fare per kilometer for the train */,
  "train_status" TEXT /* Current status of the train (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("train_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trains_train_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("train_type_id") REFERENCES train_types ("train_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "train_types" (
  "train_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each train type */,
  "train_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the train type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the train type */,
  "max_speed" INTEGER /* Maximum speed of the train type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("train_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "routes" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route */,
  "route_name" TEXT /* Name of the route */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the route */,
  "route_length" REAL /* Total length of the route in kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the station */,
  "station_code" TEXT /* Code of the station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "route_stations" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the route */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the station */,
  "sequence" INTEGER /* Sequence of the station in the route */,
  "arrival_time" TEXT /* Arrival time at the station */,
  "departure_time" TEXT /* Departure time from the station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id", "station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "train_routes" (
  "train_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the train */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the route */,
  "journey_date" TEXT /* Date of the journey */,
  "(actual_departure_time" TEXT /* Actual departure time of the train */,
  "actual_arrival_time" TEXT /* Actual arrival time of the train */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("train_id", "route_id", "journey_date")
)

CREATE TABLE "schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule */,
  "train_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the train */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the route */,
  "arrival_time" TEXT /* Arrival time of the train */,
  "departure_time" TEXT /* Departure time of the train */,
  "days_of_operation" TEXT /* Days of operation (e.g., Monday, Tuesday, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_train_id FOREIGN KEY ("train_id") REFERENCES trains ("train_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, station master, passenger) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bookings" (
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each booking */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "train_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the train */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the route */,
  "journey_date" TEXT /* Date of the journey */,
  "seat_number" TEXT /* Number of the seat booked */,
  "booking_status" TEXT /* Status of the booking (e.g., confirmed, pending, cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("booking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_train_id FOREIGN KEY ("train_id") REFERENCES trains ("train_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_history" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the booking */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of the payment */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount paid */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, debit card, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_history_booking_id FOREIGN KEY ("booking_id") REFERENCES bookings ("booking_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tickets" (
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ticket */,
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the booking */,
  "ticket_date" TEXT /* Date of the ticket */,
  "ticket_status" TEXT /* Status of the ticket (e.g., confirmed, cancelled) */,
  "qr_code" TEXT /* QR code for the ticket */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_booking_id FOREIGN KEY ("booking_id") REFERENCES bookings ("booking_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cancellations" (
  "cancellation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cancellation */,
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ticket */,
  "cancellation_date" TEXT /* Date of the cancellation */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the cancellation */,
  "refund_amount" REAL /* Amount refunded to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cancellation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cancellations_ticket_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticket_id") REFERENCES tickets ("ticket_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "delay_updates" (
  "delay_update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each delay update */,
  "train_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the train */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the route */,
  "journey_date" TEXT /* Date of the journey */,
  "delay_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the delay */,
  "expected_arrival_time" TEXT /* Expected arrival time of the train */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("delay_update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_delay_updates_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_delay_updates_train_id FOREIGN KEY ("train_id") REFERENCES trains ("train_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "penalties" (
  "penalty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each penalty */,
  "cancellation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cancellation */,
  "delay_update_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the delay update */,
  "penalty_amount" REAL /* Amount of the penalty */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("penalty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_penalties_delay_update_id FOREIGN KEY ("delay_update_id") REFERENCES delay_updates ("delay_update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_penalties_cancellation_id FOREIGN KEY ("cancellation_id") REFERENCES cancellations ("cancellation_id")
)
